description_long: This is an adult humanoid figure with pointed elf-like ears, a stern facial expression, and short, neatly styled hair. The figure is dressed in a casual, fitted long-sleeve shirt with a subtle striped pattern and a v-neck opening, paired with straight black pants. The shirt appears to be tucked in, giving a tidy and put-together look. The figure wears classic lace-up sneakers, adding to the casual urban appearance. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate. The facial features are detailed, and the ears are a distinctive fantasy element, setting this figure apart from a typical urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult with pointed elf-like ears, wearing a fitted long-sleeve shirt, black pants, and sneakers, with arms extended to the sides. The figure has a detailed face and short, styled hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, pointed ears, v-neck shirt, and sneakers clearly, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, ear shape, and the straight fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with both arms extended and ears visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, emphasizing the ear, hair, and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
